name: @wdk/wallet-evm-erc-4337
description: A simple package to manage BIP-32 wallets for evm blockchains, which implement the erc-4337 standard and its account abstraction features

scripts.test:integration-wait: wait-on http://localhost:8545 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration
scripts.test:integration-wait:coverage: wait-on http://localhost:8545 && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--experimental-vm-modules jest tests/integration --coverage
scripts.test:integration: concurrently -k -s first -n "NODE,TEST" -c "black,green" "npx hardhat node > NUL 2>&1" "npm run test:integration-wait"
scripts.test:integration:coverage: concurrently -k -s first -n "NODE,TEST" -c "black,green" "npx hardhat node > NUL 2>&1" "npm run test:integration-wait:coverage"
